away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Kiki Rice
players.injury_comment: The injury was previously considered a Grade 2 sprain, so Rice is trending in the right direction. According to Copeland, Rice will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks. Julie Allemand will likely see an uptick in minutes in the meantime.

players.name: Nyara Sabally
players.injury_comment: Sabally will be sidelined for a fourth straight contest, but she remains day-to-day. Her next chance to play comes Monday against Atlanta.

players.name: Brittney Sykes
players.injury_comment: Sykes is dealing with a plantar fascia injury and will remain sidelined for the Tempo. In the meantime, Toronto will likely lean more on Julie Allemand and Kia Nurse.

injuries.name: Nyara Sabally
injuries.comment: Sabally will be sidelined for a fourth straight contest, but she remains day-to-day. Her next chance to play comes Monday against Atlanta.

injuries.name: Brittney Sykes

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Ashlon Jackson
players.injury_comment: Jackson will be held out of Friday's contest in an effort to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next chance to play will come Monday against the Sky.

players.name: Hailey Van Lith
players.injury_comment: Van Lith will be sidelined for a fourth straight game and remains without a timetable to return. Her next chance to play comes Monday against the Sky.
